subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! That gathering was indeed one of truthfulness and fellowship, of grace and goodliness - such were those bygone days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین آاین جم راستی و دوستی و خوشخوای و نیکوای بود آن آاین ایامی چند
subcodes.subjects: @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
